title: Morse Patterns
editorialSummary: Morse code letters grouped by dot/dash pattern structure. All items are single letters. The key insight is distinguishing all-dots/all-dashes from mixed patterns. Starts-with groups require reading the first element of each letter's code.

meta.gptRationale: The Morse grouping rule is elegant and pattern-based, but it still requires enough code familiarity to avoid becoming guesswork.
